ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., MSGD, MSGD+C, MSGD+CR, RNN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., train, test) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  "dataset_status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_folds" (
  "fold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data fold */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset to which the fold belongs */,
  "fold_number" INTEGER /* Number of the fold */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data fold */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fold was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the fold */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fold was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the fold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_folds_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_folds_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "fold_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data fold */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, loss) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the performance record */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the performance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_fold_id FOREIGN KEY ("fold_id") REFERENCES data_folds ("fold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_login_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model or dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the model or dataset was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_history_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison record */,
  "model_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first model being compared */,
  "model_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second model being compared */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., loss, accuracy) */,
  "comparison_result" TEXT /* Result of the comparison */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comparison was made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comparison */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comparison record was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the comparison record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_model_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("model_id_2") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_model_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("model_id_1") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_fold_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "fold_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data fold */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_fold_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_fold_history_fold_id FOREIGN KEY ("fold_id") REFERENCES data_folds ("fold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "activity_log" TEXT /* Activity log of the user during the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the session */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
